nodes.label: AI for measurement conversion
nodes.grounding_span: getting an AI to do the conversions of whole recipes saves so much time

nodes.label: AI for recipe adaptation with dietary requirements
nodes.label_negative: Manual recipe adaptation with dietary requirements
nodes.grounding_span: I have experimented with getting the AI to make a recipe fit for a certain dietary requirement

nodes.label: AI reliability and accuracy
nodes.grounding_span: the model can make mistakes here, and as it is working with dietary requirements, this is a more dangerous mistake

nodes.label: AI as teaching tool for junior staff
nodes.label_negative: AI as potential hazard for inexperienced staff
nodes.grounding_span: I actually encourage the junior staff to use AI in the same way for measurement conversion

nodes.label: AI as creative springboard for recipe innovation
nodes.label_negative: AI as unreliable for creative recipe development
nodes.grounding_span: I would love to get to a point where we can trust AI to create recipes that cater for dietary requirements

nodes.label: Safety and accuracy in dietary compliance
nodes.grounding_span: this is a more dangerous mistake to make than simply converting a measurement wrong

nodes.label: Learning and skill development
nodes.grounding_span: it actually made my brush up on my allergen training

nodes.label: Creativity and innovation
nodes.grounding_span: allow for more creativity in this area

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for measurement conversion
nodes.grounding_span: genuinely save me so much time so that was great

nodes.label: Frustration with AI for recipe adaptation due to safety risks
nodes.grounding_span: the soy sauce fiasco I described earlier made me a little frustrated

nodes.label: Cautious trust in AI for low-risk tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I don't 100% trust it to get these types of task right by itself

nodes.label: Aspirational hope for AI in creative recipe development
nodes.grounding_span: I would love to get to a point where we can trust AI to create recipes

nodes.label: Trial-and-error refinement of AI interaction
nodes.grounding_span: I have found sometimes that copying in the whole recipe ... can sometimes confuse the model

nodes.label: Domain-specific risk calibration
nodes.grounding_span: I tend to not reply on AI for tasks like this
